nasb.text: You will go out through breaches in the walls, Each one straight before her, And you will be cast to Harmon,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: And you shall go out through the breaches, each one straight ahead; and you shall be cast out into Harmon,” declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 你們一個一個經過城牆的破口出去， 被丟棄在哈門。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 你们都要从城墙缺口走出来， 被丢到哈门。 这是耶和华说的。
